name: bep-me-huyen-root
description: Unified launcher for Bếp Mẹ Huyền Project

scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix server & npm run dev --prefix client
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build-local: npm run build --prefix client && rm -rf server/public/* && cp -r client/dist/* server/public/
